mapper.insert: insert into employee(employee.id, employee.name, employee.username, employee.password, employee.phone, employee.sex, employee.id_number, employee.status, employee.create_time, employee.update_time, employee.create_user, employee.update_user) values (#{employee.id},#{employee.name},#{employee.username},#{employee.password},#{employee.phone},#{employee.sex},#{employee.idNumber},#{employee.status},#{employee.createTime},#{employee.updateTime},#{employee.createUser},#{employee.updateUser})
mapper.select:
select * from employee
and name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
order by updatetime
